title: [worker-tick-pre-flight] implement br show check + br sync --import-only fallback for bead-missing-from-local-db Forever Rule

did_gates.gate: AG1: pre-flight `br show <bead-id>` instruction emitted in packet
did_gates.evidence: build-dispatch-packet.sh:197 emits `br show %s --json` interpolated with bead-id; T3+T7 PASS

did_gates.gate: AG2: `br sync --import-only` fallback emitted on miss
did_gates.evidence: Step 2 in emitted block; T4 PASS

did_gates.gate: AG3: BLOCKED with blocker_class=bead_missing_from_local_db (no silent failure)
did_gates.evidence: Emitted callback signature includes blocker_type=flywheel_class blocker_class=bead_missing_from_local_db; T5+T8 PASS

did_gates.gate: AG4: block added to dispatch packet template + REQUIRED_BLOCKS
did_gates.evidence: build-dispatch-packet.sh:228 PRE-FLIGHT BEAD PRESENCE BLOCK in REQUIRED_BLOCKS; dispatch-template-audit.sh accepts the block (T9 PASS)

did_gates.gate: AG5: smoke test — non-existent bead surfaces pre-flight catch
did_gates.evidence: Test fixture with stub br simulating ISSUE_NOT_FOUND on show + no-op on sync; T10 PASS

no_bead_reason: parent flywheel-s2yd8 close already established Forever Rule + INCIDENTS.md doctrine entry; this dispatch is the structural implementation; no follow-up gap surfaced

L61_ecosystem_touch.no_touch_reason: Forever Rule already lives in INCIDENTS.md#bead-missing-from-local-db (filed by flywheel-s2yd8 close); this dispatch is the structural enforcement, not new doctrine. The canonical L120 BR-CLOSE-EXECUTED rule remains accurate; the new pre-flight block sits before L120 and prevents the close-before-bead-exists failure mode.

mission_rationale: The bead-missing-from-local-db trauma class corrupted bead-state machine reliability across cross-worktree dispatches. Baking the Forever-Rule pre-flight into the dispatch packet template means every future worker receives the verify-then-sync-or-surface contract for free; serves continuous-orchestrator-uptime by removing the structural condition under which a worker can phantom-close a bead it doesn't have.
